reviews.comment:
Pare a comprar cigarros y una gaseosa con la moto y no me dejaron estacionar la moto me dijo un playero que tenia que dejarla afuera a un costado, me pregunto si era socio de ACA  se ve que si no sos gente de plata no podes parar a comprar

(Translated by Google)
I stopped to buy cigarettes and a soda on my motorcycle, and they wouldn't let me park it. A gas station attendant told me I had to leave it outside to the side. He asked me if I was a member of ACA (Automobile Club of Argentina). Apparently, if you're not rich, you can't stop to buy anything.

reviewReply.comment: El full es p todo público el estacionamiento es reducido y se ocupa rápido

reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/2111243949080318212/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURuazRpdUR3EAE

reviews.comment:
Hoy domingo faltaba una hora para el cierre de YPF Full me invitaron a retirarme cdo se me ocurrio pedir tres combos de hamburguesas diciendome la empleada a cargo del lugar que las mismas tardaban entre 25 a 30 minutos. Era evidente que siendo las 20 50 hs no tenia ganas de trabajar. Dado que en otro Full de calle Paraguay nos atendieron perfectamente tardando las mismas hamburguesas 7 minutos. Conclusion la empleada a cargo del Full ACA Libertador hoy domingo 6 de octubre 20:50 hs. claramente no tenia ganas de trabajar.

(Translated by Google)
Today, Sunday, an hour before closing time at the YPF Full, they asked me to leave when I ordered three burger combos. The employee in charge told me they would take 25 to 30 minutes. It was obvious that, at 8:50 PM, she didn't feel like working. At another YPF Full on Paraguay Street, we received excellent service, and the same burgers arrived in 7 minutes. In conclusion, the employee in charge of the YPF Full on Libertador today, Sunday, October 6th, at 8:50 PM, clearly didn't feel like working.

Muy amable y gracias por su comentario

reviews.comment:
Es una estafa lo que hacen los playeros! Te dicen que te asocies al ACA para tener un descuento, asegurando que no te van a cobrar nada. Y después te cae en el resumen una cuota social de 20 lucas. Una vergüenza.

(Translated by Google)
What the beach vendors are doing is a scam! They tell you to join the ACA to get a discount, assuring you that they won't charge you anything. And then you get a 20-thousand-dollar membership fee on your bill. Disgraceful.

reviewReply.comment:
Disculpe se le rxplico correctamente las primeras tres cuotas son sl 50 % y con entrega de 16 000 pesos en vales , el debito entra pero tiene el reintegro que se le dijo , entendió mal calculamos que nunca retiro sus vales y en el momento tiene el 5 % sobre la carga de combustible 
Gracias
